name: Klarify
long_description:
Klarify handles everything therapists do outside the session, from clinical notes and treatment plans to insurance claims and finding new clients.

Therapists hold the world together. They also run businesses, file insurance claims, write letters, fill forms, supervise new grads, and do hours of paperwork every night. Practice management software has existed for decades. It records what therapists do. It can't actually do any of it.

Klara is the AI at the heart of Klarify. She reads the session and does the work that comes after it: notes, treatment plans, clinical letters, insurance claims, client homework, supervision prep, and the profile pages that bring in new clients.

5,200 therapists use Klarify today.

Our mission is to empower therapists, not replace them. So they can focus on the one thing only a human can do. Be present with their client.
one_liner: AI-native operating system for mental health practices
